title: [FIRRTL] Zero-width Index into MultibitMuxOp Crashes IMCP
body:
The following will currently crash IMCP:

```
circuit Foo:
  module Foo:
    input a: UInt<1>[2]
    output b: UInt<1>

    wire sel: UInt<0>
    sel is invalid

    b <= a[sel]
```

Stacktrace:
```
Assertion failed: (bitPosition < getBitWidth() && "Bit position out of bounds!"), function operator[], file APInt.h, line 1014.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/circt and include the crash backtrace.
Stack dump:
0.      Program arguments: firtool Tmp.fir -mlir-print-ir-after-all
Stack dump without symbol names (ensure you have llvm-symbolizer in your PATH or set the environment var `LLVM_SYMBOLIZER_PATH` to point to it):
0  firtool                  0x00000001067ce71d llvm::sys::PrintStackTrace(llvm::raw_ostream&, int) + 61
1  firtool                  0x00000001067cec9b PrintStackTraceSignalHandler(void*) + 27
2  firtool                  0x00000001067ccac6 llvm::sys::RunSignalHandlers() + 134
3  firtool                  0x00000001067d082f SignalHandler(int) + 223
4  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x00007ff813a72dfd _sigtramp + 29
5  libsystem_platform.dylib 0x00007ff7b998ee40 _sigtramp + 18446744072198668384
6  libsystem_c.dylib        0x00007ff8139a8d24 abort + 123
7  libsystem_c.dylib        0x00007ff8139a80cb err + 0
8  firtool                  0x00000001073144cf llvm::APInt::operator[](unsigned int) const + 111
9  firtool                  0x00000001074bdf2b llvm::APInt::isNegative() const + 27
10 firtool                  0x0000000107400119 llvm::APInt::getNumSignBits() const + 25
11 firtool                  0x00000001074be2bb llvm::APInt::getSignificantBits() const + 27
12 firtool                  0x00000001068e3565 llvm::APInt::getMinSignedBits() const + 21
13 firtool                  0x0000000106c9d479 llvm::APSInt::getExtValue() const + 25
14 firtool                  0x00000001073a4c74 circt::firrtl::MultibitMuxOp::fold(llvm::ArrayRef<mlir::Attribute>) + 164
```

The problematic MLIR is:
```mlir
firrtl.circuit "Foo"  {
  firrtl.module @Foo(in %a_0: !firrtl.uint<1>, in %a_1: !firrtl.uint<1>, out %b: !firrtl.uint<1>) {
    %sel = firrtl.wire   : !firrtl.uint<0>
    %c0_ui0 = firrtl.constant 0 : !firrtl.uint<0>
    firrtl.strictconnect %sel, %c0_ui0 : !firrtl.uint<0>
    %0 = firrtl.multibit_mux %sel, %a_1, %a_0 : !firrtl.uint<0>, !firrtl.uint<1>
    firrtl.strictconnect %b, %0 : !firrtl.uint<1>
  }
}
```
